name: digest
style: Sunday weekly recap. Emerald panel for top-idea, aubergine for top-article, mint AM / lavender PM slot markers.

slides.description: Mint week stamp + massive emerald 'W17' + 2-line sub + meta strip (AM/PM/library/subs).
Mint sun icon header + 5 day-rows (MON-FRI) with idea title + pitch + arrow-up-right.
Lavender moon icon header + 5 day-rows with brief title + hook. PM theme.
Emerald panel. 'Most-saved' tag in mint. Idea name in white + meta chips.
Aubergine panel. 'Article of the week' lavender tag. Title + pulled excerpt + 4 stats.
Reader win quote, lime-bordered panel. Lime highlight word inside quote.
Week N+1 preview. 5 rows, mint day labels, 'next five already drafted' headline.
Mint eyebrow + 2-line headline (mint accent) + mint button.

notes: Only layout to use emerald bg panels — the Sunday-recap calm signature.
AM rows use mint markers, PM rows use lavender — keeps the two halves of the day distinct at a glance.
Community slide requires a real reader quote — don't fabricate. If none available, replace with community stats (subs, open rate, etc.).
